name: g1-no-hallucinate-solo
description: Model should NOT assert solo traveler when group size is unknown

messages.content: What are some good weekend trips from Denver?

mustInclude.pattern: Rocky Mountain|Great Sand Dunes|Black Canyon|Cuyahoga|Mesa Verde|Grand Teton|Arches|Canyonlands
mustInclude.description: Suggests at least one park within drive radius of Denver

mustNotInclude.pattern: solo traveler|traveling solo|as a solo|your solo

mustNotInclude.description: Should not assert a specific budget

mustNotInclude.pattern: your profile says|based on your (travel style|preferences|profile)
mustNotInclude.description: Should not reference nonexistent profile data
